summary: Enumerates one exact Aobus command, schema, grammar, protocol, or format surface.

# Reference title

## Scope and version

Identify the exact surface and its version authority.

## Code boundary

Link the system architecture and owning subsystem architecture.
Name the owning layer and relevant public and implementation paths without redefining the layer model.

## Surface

Provide the exhaustive command, field, type, grammar, value, or layout inventory.

## Validation rules

Define exact accepted types, values, required fields, and bounds.
Link to the owning specification for observable rejection and failure behavior.

## Compatibility and versioning

Define compatibility guarantees, migrations, and version gates.

## Examples

Provide exact examples that conform to the reference.

## Implementation authority

Link the code or machine-readable schema that owns this surface.

## Test authority

Link round-trip, parser, schema, or generated-reference tests.

## Related documents

Link behavior specifications and architecture without duplicating them.
